---
title: 'Motorcycle'
date: '2015-09-20T19:55:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3825004538484082583'
blogger_filename: '/2015/09/motorcycle.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Thought'
---

<br />
<br />
I had a thought that I should pursue owning a motorcycle. They are great on gas, easier to maneuver and park, cheaper to own. I've had this thought for a while, but this week I felt it should be a serious investigation.<br />
<br />
Flavia told me the last time I mentioned it, that I wasn't serious because I hadn't looked into it. So...<br />
<br />
Here is the start of my looking into it.<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle</a><br />
<div style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; margin-top: 0.5em;">
A&nbsp;<b>motorcycle</b>&nbsp;(also called a&nbsp;<b>motorbike</b>,&nbsp;<b>bike</b>,&nbsp;<b>moto</b>&nbsp;or&nbsp;<b>cycle</b>) is a two<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-1" style="font-size: 11.2px; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle#cite_note-1" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[1]</a></sup>&nbsp;or three wheeled<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-2" style="font-size: 11.2px; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle#cite_note-2" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[2]</a></sup>&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motor_vehicle" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motor vehicle">motor vehicle</a>. Motorcycle design varies greatly to suit a range of different purposes:&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Long-distance_motorcycle_riding" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Long-distance motorcycle riding">long distance</a>&nbsp;travel,&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle_commuting" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle commuting">commuting</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cruising_(driving)" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Cruising (driving)">cruising</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle_sport" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle sport">sport</a>&nbsp;including&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle_racing" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle racing">racing</a>, and&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Off-roading" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Off-roading">off-road</a>&nbsp;riding.&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycling" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycling">Motorcycling</a>&nbsp;is riding a motorcycle and related social activity such as joining a&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle_club" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle club">motorcycle club</a>&nbsp;and attending<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle_rally" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle rally">motorcycle rallies</a>.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; margin-top: 0.5em;">
In 1894, Hildebrand &amp; WolfmÃ¼ller became the first series production motorcycle, and the first to be called a motorcycle. In 2012, the three top motorcycle producers globally by volume were&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Honda" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Honda">Honda</a>&nbsp;(from Japan),&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bajaj_Auto" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Bajaj Auto">Bajaj Auto</a>, and&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hero_MotoCorp" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Hero MotoCorp">Hero MotoCorp</a>&nbsp;(both from India).<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-3" style="font-size: 11.2px; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle#cite_note-3" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[3]</a></sup></div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; margin-top: 0.5em;">
Motorcycles are mainly a luxury good in the developed world, where they are used mostly for recreation, as a lifestyle accessory or a symbol of personal identity. In developing countries, motorcycles are overwhelmingly utilitarian due to lower prices and greater&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle#Fuel_economy" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Motorcycle">fuel economy</a>. Of all the motorcycles in the world, 58% are in the Asia Pacific and Southern and Eastern Asia regions, excluding car-centric Japan.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.4px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; margin-top: 0.5em;">
According to the&nbsp;<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States_Department_of_Transportation" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="United States Department of Transportation">United States Department of Transportation</a>&nbsp;the number of fatalities per vehicle mile traveled was 37 times higher for motorcycles than for cars.<sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-www-nrd.nhtsa.dot.gov_4-0" style="font-size: 11.2px; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Motorcycle#cite_note-www-nrd.nhtsa.dot.gov-4" style="background: none; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[4]</a></sup></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
http://www.motorcycle.com/manufacturer/kawasaki/2015-kawasaki-vulcan-s-abs-video-review.html<br />
<br />
<b style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 23.1px; margin: 0px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px;"><a href="http://www.motorcycle.com/manufacturer/kawasaki.html" style="color: #0983b6; text-decoration: none;">Kawasaki</a></b><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 23.1px;">&nbsp;recently allowed us to ride the&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.motorcycle.com/manufacturer/kawasaki/2015-kawasaki-vulcan-s-abs-first-ride-review.html" style="background-color: white; color: #0983b6; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 23.1px; text-decoration: none;"><b style="background: transparent; border: 0px; margin: 0px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px;">2015 Kawasaki Vulcan S ABS</b></a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 23.1px;">, and and the innovative cruiser hybrid impressed both me and our female tester, Vicki Gray.</span><br />
<br />
http://www.motorcycle.com/manufacturer/kawasaki-vulcan.html<br />
<br />
<br />
http://www.motorcycle.com/specs/kawasaki/cruiser/2010/vulcan-reg-900/classic.html<br />
<br />
<br />
2010 Kawasaki VulcanÂ® 900 Classic
<br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px;">2010 Kawasaki VulcanÂ® 900 Classic pictures, prices, information, and specifications. Below is the information on the 2010 Kawasaki VulcanÂ® 900 Classic. If you would like to get a quote on a new 2010 Kawasaki VulcanÂ® 900 Classic use our&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.motorcycle.com/specs/kawasaki/cruiser/2010/vulcan-reg-900/classic/build.html" style="background-color: white; color: #0983b6; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px; text-decoration: none;">Build Your Own</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px;">&nbsp;tool, or&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.motorcycle.com/specs/kawasaki/cruiser/2010/vulcan-reg-900/classic/compare.html" style="background-color: white; color: #0983b6; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px;">Compare</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px;">&nbsp;this bike to other Cruiser motorcycles.To view more specifications, visit our&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.motorcycle.com/specs/kawasaki/cruiser/2010/vulcan-reg-900/classic/detail.html" style="background-color: white; color: #0983b6; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px; text-decoration: none;"><b style="background: transparent; border: 0px; margin: 0px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px;">Detailed Specifications</b></a><span style="background-color: white; color: #878787; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19.2px;">.</span><br />
<br />
http://www.hponline.com/mc_survey.htm<br />
<br />
<strong style="background-color: white; color: red; font-family: 'Open Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 20.8px; text-align: center;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: large;">10 Things to Consider When Buying a Motorcycle</span></strong><br />
<br />
<br />
http://texasrider.com<br />
<span style="background-color: yellow; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; text-align: -webkit-center;">$200.00 Basic Rider Course</span><br />
<br />
<div style="color: #000099; text-align: -webkit-center;">
<span style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong><u>Bedford</u></strong></span></div>
<div style="color: #000099; text-align: -webkit-center;">
<strong><span style="font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;">Pennington Field<br />1501 Central Dr<br />Bedford, TX 76022</span></strong></div>
<div style="color: #000099; text-align: -webkit-center;">
Take Hwy. 183 to Central Drive, turn (South) go two blocks and turn (Right) into the parking lot of Pennington Field - HEB-ISD, stay to the right and head to the back fence. Just ignore any other classes you might see going on out front.</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
http://www.msf-usa.org/brc.aspx<br />
<br />
<h4 class="brc-course-info-heading text-center" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 10px; margin-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 5px; text-align: center; text-decoration: underline;">
Here is a List of the 14 Hands-on Riding Exercises in the Course:</h4>
<ol style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; margin-top: 0px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Motorcycle Familiarization</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Review T-CLOCS pre-ride inspection</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Identify location and operation of important controls and major parts</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Review mounting/dismounting procedures</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Review elements of good posture</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Using the Friction Zone</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Become skilled in using the clutch friction zone for control</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Starting &amp; Stopping Drill</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Coordinate the friction zone, throttle, and brakes to control the motorcycle</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Start out and stop with precision and control</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Shifting &amp; Stopping</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Shift gears and stop smoothly</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Basic Skill Practice</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Refine low-speed maneuvering skills</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Refine throttle use and brake manipulation for corners</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Pressing to Initiate and Adjust Lean</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Understand the maneuvering elements needed for negotiating curves</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Experience the effects of handgrip pressure and handlebar movement to initiate and adjust lean</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Stopping More Quickly &amp; Tight Turns from a Stop</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Develop a feel for progressive braking pressure to stop more quickly without skidding</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Practice making a sharp turn from a stop</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Stopping Distance Demonstration</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Observe a demonstration of the reaction/braking parts of total stopping distance</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">To understand effects of speed on braking distance</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">To relate the results to intersection strategies</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Limited-Space Maneuvers</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Refine maneuvering skills to allow turns in limited spaces</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Learn the counterweighting technique</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Stopping in a Curve</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Learn to maintain control while stopping in a curve</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Understand traction management</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Curve Judgment</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Improve skills for negotiating multiple curves</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Understand the "search-setup-smooth" strategy</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Multiple Curves &amp; Lane Changes</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Practice negotiating curves and lane changes</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Understand safety margins and gap selection</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Crossing an Obstacle &amp; Swerving</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Learn techniques for crossing over obstacles</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Execute a basic swerve</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Practice turning from a stop</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Refine slow-speed weaves</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Skill Practice</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">Capstone exercise that combines a variety of maneuvers</li>
</ul>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1.1em;">Skill Test</li>
<ul style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">To assess basic skills using a cone weave, normal stop, turning from a stop, U-turn, quick stop, obstacle swerve, and cornering maneuver.</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">To demonstrate basic motorcycle control skills and ability to avoid an obstacle</li>
<li style="box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 1em; list-style: disc;">To demonstrate ability to use the proper technique to negotiate a curve</li>
</ul>
</ol>
<div style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
The course concludes with a classroom knowledge test and hands-on a riding skill evaluation. Once your RiderCoach hands you the course-completion card, you'll be happy knowing that youâ€™ve gone the extra mile to develop your own safe riding techniques.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
There are benefits to taking a&nbsp;<i style="box-sizing: border-box;">RiderCourse</i>&nbsp;besides learning important skills and strategies: Most states waive the riding portion of your motorcycle endorsement test if youâ€™ve successfully completed the Basic&nbsp;<i style="box-sizing: border-box;">RiderCourse</i>, and your insurance company might provide a discount on your insurance. Be sure to ask your agent.</div>
<div style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: Ubuntu; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px;">
Course fees vary depending on where you live. Some motorcycle distributors and brand-sponsored clubs have programs to reimburse you for all or part of the tuition. With more than 2,500&nbsp;<i style="box-sizing: border-box;">RiderCourse</i>&nbsp;sites across the country, there is probably one near you.</div>
<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="4" style="background-color: white; color: black; font-family: Arial, Tahoma, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px;"><tbody>
<tr><td align="right">Company:&nbsp;</td><td align="left"><a href="http://www.lonestarbikers.com/" id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lnkCompany" style="color: black; font-style: italic; outline: none;" target="_blank" title="Open company website in new window.">Lone S.T.A.R. Bikers</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lonestarbikers.com/" id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lnkCompanyImg" style="color: black; font-style: italic; outline: none;" target="_blank" title="Open company website in new window."><img alt="" src="/images/imported/training-msf-usa-org/url-ae6e7e7047fa.gif" style="border: 0px;" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td align="right">Site:&nbsp;</td><td align="left"><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lnkSite" style="outline: none;" target="_blank" title="Open site website in new window.">TEXAS MOTOR SPEEDWAY - NORTH</a></td></tr>
<tr><td align="right">Phone:&nbsp;</td><td align="left"><span id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lblEnrollmentPhone">(940) 594-8144</span></td></tr>
<tr><td align="right" valign="top">Office Address:&nbsp;</td><td align="left"><span id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lblSponsorAddress">Justin, TX 76247<br />US</span></td></tr>
<tr><td align="right">Email Address:&nbsp;</td><td align="left"><span id="ctl00_ctlMainContent_lblEnrollmentEmail">martinodessa84@yahoo.com</span></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
http://www.lonestarbikers.com<br />
<br />
<br />
<h3 style="background-color: #b0b0b0; color: #360b00; font-family: Abel, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5em; line-height: 1.1em; margin: 2px; padding-left: 15px; padding-right: 15px; text-align: center; text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 0px 4px 4px;">
844.4UR.RIDE Basic&nbsp;<em>RiderCourse</em>&nbsp;as low as&nbsp;<span style="background-color: rgba(255, 245, 0, 0.6);">$180</span></h3>
<br />
<table border="0" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="color: black; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; height: 100%px;"><tbody>
<tr><td bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">B151017-18ATMS2</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">&nbsp;</span></span></td><td align="right" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">$160</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">Oct 17 Sat</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">8:30AM-6:00PM</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">Oct 18 Sun</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">8:00AM-5:00PM</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">&nbsp;</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">8</span></span></td><td bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">C: The MULE Barn</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">R: Texas Motor Speedway</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#FFFFFF" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;"><input height="36" name="mapLink" src="/images/imported/app-msi5-com/map-0295421dfb95.png" type="image" width="36" /></span></span></td></tr>
<tr><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null"><img border="0" hspace="0" id="tblSchedule_lnkNewRegister_29" src="/images/imported/app-msi5-com/detail-80df21584b62.gif" title="Register" vspace="0" /></a></td><td bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">B151017-18ATMS1</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">&nbsp;</span></span></td><td align="right" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">$160</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">Oct 17 Sat</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">8:30AM-6:00PM</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">Oct 18 Sun</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">8:00AM-5:00PM</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">&nbsp;</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;">12</span></span></td><td bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">C: The MULE Barn</span></span><br /><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 11px;">R: Texas Motor Speedway</span></span></td><td align="center" bgcolor="#F2F2F2" valign="top"><span style="color: midnightblue;"><span style="font-size: 12px;"><input height="36" name="mapLink" src="/images/imported/app-msi5-com/map-0295421dfb95.png" type="image" width="36" /></span></span></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
